steps.title: Prerequisites
steps.body: Bridge running. Optional, automated-covered serialization check: confirm the serializer bounds cyclic graphs and emits a $ref marker for the back-edge (no hang, no stack overflow). Cycle handling is asserted by the automated test below; this scenario is a runnable confidence pass against the live serializer.

payload.code:
class N { public string id; public N next; }
var a = new N { id = "a" }; a.next = a; return a;

steps.title: Expected outcomes
items: mutation.output contains a {"$ref":"N"} marker for the back-edge
the call returns promptly (no hang, no stack overflow)
a repeated but non-cyclic value does not produce a false $ref marker

reset.note: execute_csharp is transient (no disk artifact); nothing is reverted on disk.
